query:
-- Check these 5 remaining conversations — what's the latest non-template message?
SELECT wc.id, 
  (SELECT m.content FROM messages m WHERE m.waConversationId = wc.id AND m.messageType != 'templateMessage' ORDER BY m.timestamp DESC LIMIT 1) as latest_real_content,
  (SELECT m.messageType FROM messages m WHERE m.waConversationId = wc.id AND m.messageType != 'templateMessage' ORDER BY m.timestamp DESC LIMIT 1) as latest_real_type,
  (SELECT m.timestamp FROM messages m WHERE m.waConversationId = wc.id AND m.messageType != 'templateMessage' ORDER BY m.timestamp DESC LIMIT 1) as latest_real_ts,
  wc.lastMessageAt as current_preview_ts
FROM wa_conversations wc
WHERE wc.id IN (300044, 300275, 330626, 330646, 330653);
